name: WLF_LI_BOOKINGS
description: Table to store details of activity bookings

columns.Name: BOOKING_ID
columns.Comments: Booking Id pk

columns.Name: BOOKING_NUMBER
columns.Comments: UserKey for uniquely identifying Learning Booking.

columns.Name: ADHOC_ITEM_DESC
columns.Comments: ADHOC Resource Description

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Activity learning item id

columns.Name: BOOKED_ITEM_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates what type of booked item this is (resource, person, etc)

columns.Name: BOOKED_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Can be a resource_id or person_id

columns.Name: PRIMARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Primary Flag

columns.Name: ADHOC_ITEM_NAME
columns.Comments: Adhoc resource name

columns.Name: ADHOC_ITEM_QUANTITY
columns.Comments: ADHOC_ITEM_QUANTITY

columns.Name: HOST_URL
columns.Comments: Vilt host url value

columns.Name: VILT_PRODUCT
columns.Comments: Webex product type

columns.Name: VILT_CALL_TIME
columns.Comments: Vilt call timestamp

columns.Name: VILT_CALL_STATUS
columns.Comments: Vilt call status

columns.Name: VILT_CALL_LOG
columns.Comments: Vilt call log

columns.Name: SESSION_KEY
columns.Comments: Session key

columns.Name: RECORDING_LOCATION
columns.Comments: URL for the recording of the meeting

columns.Name: OPEN_TIME
columns.Comments: The amount of time before the meeting starts in which the VILT learner can join the meeting

columns.Name: RECORDING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the VILT ACCOUNT associated to the ILT activity has recordings or not. Y/N value

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: IN_ELASTIC
columns.Comments: Indicates if record is processed to security index or not
